## Summary
- What changed?
- Why?

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added first when behavior changed (TDD)
- [ ] `make ci` passes locally
- [ ] Coverage impact reviewed
- [ ] Story/issue reference included (for example `TTR-E09-S08`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior, flags, workflows, or guarantees changed
- [ ] Spec updated or `docs/spec-questions.md` linked if this resolves a spec mismatch
- [ ] Commit messages follow the project's conventional-commit format
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit --signoff`)

## Validation
What did you run to verify this change?

## Notes for reviewers
Anything non-obvious, risky, or intentionally deferred.
